name: Columbus Circle Capital Corp III
business: Columbus Circle Capital Corp III is a blank check company incorporated to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, or similar business combination with one or more entities. It has not selected any business combination target and has not initiated any substantive discussions. It may pursue an initial business combination in any business or industry.

exposures.sentence: We believe that there are ample opportunities in our target industries, which include artificial intelligence (AI) and digital infrastructure, sports, media and entertainment, energy transition, mining industries and cryptocurrency (our Target Industries).

tamClaims.claim: The 2033 Global AI market size is expected to reach $3.5 trillion with a projected CAGR of 30.6% from 2026 to 2033.
tamClaims.sentence: The 2033 Global AI market size is expected to reach $3.5 trillion with a projected CAGR of 30.6% from 2026 to 2033 and underscores what we believe is the transformative potential of AI across various sectors.

tamClaims.claim: The global sports market is projected to reach $654 billion by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: The global sports market is projected to reach $654 billion by 2030, and the 2026 global sports media rights value is expected to reach $67 billion.

tamClaims.claim: The global energy transition market size is projected to reach $7.7 trillion in 2035 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 12.4% from 2026 to 2035.
tamClaims.sentence: The global energy transition market size is projected to reach $7.7 trillion in 2035 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 12.4% from 2026 to 2035.

tamClaims.claim: The global cryptocurrency market cap sits at $2.6 trillion as of May 19, 2026, and the global cryptocurrency market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 14.5% from 2026 to 2033.
